summary_en: Buyback progress update. Specific cumulative acquisition data, authorized limit consumption percentage, and reporting period not legible from provided PDF excerpt.
title_en: Notice regarding the acquisition status of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: This is a progress notification regarding the acquisition of treasury shares by 旭情報 (Asahi Joho). The document reports on the status of an ongoing share buyback program. However, the specific numerical details—including the number of shares acquired, total yen expenditure, percentage of authorized limit consumed, execution period, and acquisition method—are not legible in the provided PDF excerpt. To obtain the complete progress details, reference to the full disclosure document or investor relations materials is required.
